name: Kokuwamon

signature_move.name: Scissor Arms Mini
signature_move.description: 12Discharges electricity from the pincers on both of its arms and cuts through solid objects.Creates whips of electricity from its pincers.

description: A very unusual Insect Mecha-Digimon that was recently discovered. Insect Mecha-Digimon had not been discovered until now, and their existence itself was never even imagined. Because it will discharge 1 MV of electricity from the stun gun -shaped head and arms it possesses if it senses danger, you mustn't carelessly approach. However, it has not an aggressive personality, but a docile personality which seeks tranquility. It uses electricity as its source of nutrients, and charges electric power using its middle two legs. Its Special Move is discharging electricity from the pincers on both of its arms and cutting through solid objects ( Scissor Arms Mini ).
